embedding.description: A request to generate the embeddings.

model.description: The model used to generate the embeddings.

properties.description: The list of properties to use to generate the embeddings.

items.description: The list of properties to use to generate the embeddings.

embedding.title: EmbeddingRequest

fetch_options.description: Fetch Options for Web Page Import

block_ads.description: Block ads to save bandwidth (premium_scraper only).

country_code.description: Country code for the proxy (premium_scraper only).

render_js.description: Render JavaScript on the target page (premium_scraper only).

wait_for.description: CSS selector to wait for before returning (premium_scraper only).

fetch_options.title: WebPageImportFetchOptions

id.description: The Web Page id (or iri) in Graph when available.

id_generator.description: The entity id generator, by default uses the web page path.

output_types.description: The type of the generated entities, by default `http://schema.org/WebPage`.

items.description: The type of the generated entities, by default `http://schema.org/WebPage`.

url.description: The Web Page url to import

write_strategy.description: The strategy used to write to the Graph: `createOrUpdateModel` (default) will replace existing entities; `patchReplaceModel` will replace the `type`, `headline`, `abstract` and `text` properties.
